message:
Revert to cursor approach, document structuredClone limitation

Constructor-based per-row objects (2.89x iterate, 3.42x stringify)
were slower than cursor+Proxy (1.56x iterate, 2.71x stringify).
Creating 1000 objects upfront costs more than Proxy trap overhead.

Documents structuredClone limitation: Proxy objects cannot be cloned,
use materialize() first. Recommends destructuring for safe value
capture from cursor.
